speaker: speaker1
text: What can I do for you today ?

speaker: speaker1
text: What do you need to know ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I need to take the driver's course . How many hours do I need ?

speaker: speaker1
text: It depends on what you're trying to do with the completion of the course .

speaker: speaker2
text: I need to get my license .

speaker: speaker1
text: You're going to need to complete six hours .

speaker: speaker2
text: How many hours a day can I do ?

speaker: speaker1
text: You can do two hours a day for three days .

speaker: speaker2
text: That's all I need to do to finish ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , that's all you need to do .

speaker: speaker2
text: Thanks . I'll get back to you .
